title: FractionsOfACent ExposureType (L5 canon-as-data)
description: One broad credential-exposure category. Mirrors the ExposureTypeEntity rows seeded from Patterns.cs ExposureTypes.All; the Findings foreign key points at Name. The auto_inform default gates the auto-notify pass (FOAC-LAW-2).

name.description: Matches ExposureTypes constant in v2/Shared/Patterns.cs and the FK target.

auto_inform_default.description: Seeded default of ExposureTypeEntity.AutoInform. Always false per FOAC-LAW-2.

opt_in_only.description: True if the matching patterns are excluded from the default scan (require --include-passwords).
